title: EvidenceRecord
description: Schema for a decision evidence record in the Fabrica de Sistemas knowledge engine.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for the decision: timestamp-based hash (e.g. 20260605T142300-a3f9b1c2).

mission_id.description: Identifier of the mission this decision belongs to (e.g. MISSION-001).

decision.description: A concise statement of the decision that was made.

evidence.description: The reasoning or evidence that supports the decision.

source.description: The source consulted (book title, article name, framework name, or 'internal').

author.description: Name of the agent or human that recorded this decision.

work.description: The specific work item, module, or task context for this decision.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the decision, from 0.0 (no confidence) to 1.0 (fully certain).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 datetime string when the decision was recorded.

tags.description: Optional list of tags for categorisation (e.g. architecture, security, performance).

related_decisions.description: Optional list of decision_ids that are related to or supersede this record.
